name: Nova Buds Pro - Matte Black
description: Experience true wireless freedom with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and crystal-clear calls. Perfect for your daily commute and intense workouts.

name: Stealth RGB Gaming Mouse
description: Ultra-lightweight gaming mouse with 16,000 DPI sensor, customizable RGB lighting, and programmable buttons. Engineered for pro-level precision and speed.

name: ZenWatch Series 5 Smartwatch
description: Stay connected and track your fitness goals with a vibrant AMOLED display, heart rate monitoring, and built-in GPS. Up to 10 days of battery life.

name: Vibe Retro Oversized Hoodie
description: Ultra-soft premium cotton hoodie featuring a vintage cyber-aesthetic print. Designed for ultimate comfort and effortless street style.

name: Titan 1TB External SSD
description: Lightning-fast data transfer speeds in a compact, shock-resistant design. Compatible with laptops, gaming consoles, and mobile devices.

name: AeroBeam Mini Projector
description: Pocket-sized 1080p projector with built-in speakers and smart OS. Transform any wall into a high-definition cinema screen.

name: Nebula Mechanical Keyboard
description: Tactile blue switches with hot-swappable keys and dynamic RGB effects. Built with a durable aluminum frame for hardcore gaming sessions.

name: SonicWave Soundbar 2.1
description: Immersive 3D surround sound with deep bass and wireless subwoofer. Perfect for movies, music, and gaming setups.

name: Cyber-Link Multi-Port Hub
description: 7-in-1 USB-C hub with 4K HDMI, SD card reader, and high-speed data ports. Expand your workspace connectivity instantly.

name: Glow-Line Desk Mat (Large)
description: Water-resistant micro-textured surface with integrated RGB edge lighting. Provides a smooth gliding experience for your mouse.

name: Vibe Mesh Tech Sneakers
description: Breathable mesh upper with neon accents and ultra-responsive cushioning. The perfect fusion of futuristic design and athletic performance.

name: ChargeFlow 20K Power Bank
description: 20,000mAh capacity with 65W fast charging support. Charge your laptop, phone, and earbuds multiple times on a single go.

name: Apex Wireless Gaming Headset
description: Ultra-low latency 2.4GHz wireless connection with spatial audio and a retractable noise-canceling mic. Lightweight design for all-day comfort.

name: Smart-Vibe LED Strip (5m)
description: WiFi-connected RGB LED strip with music sync and voice control support. Create the perfect atmosphere for your gaming room or studio.

name: Cyber-View 2K WebCam
description: Crystal-clear 1440p resolution with integrated ring light and privacy cover. Ideal for high-quality streaming and professional video calls.

name: Vibe Canvas Tech Backpack
description: Waterproof modular backpack with a dedicated padded laptop compartment and hidden anti-theft pockets. Built for the modern urban explorer.

name: PureFlow Air Purifier
description: Advanced 3-stage filtration with HEPA filter and real-time air quality monitoring. Quiet operation mode for undisturbed sleep.

name: Ghost RGB Fan Case Pack
description: Pack of 3 120mm silent fans with addressable RGB lighting. Enhance your PC's cooling performance and style.

name: SonicLink Bluetooth Receiver
description: Convert any wired speakers into a wireless system with high-fidelity Bluetooth 5.0 streaming. Compact and easy to set up.

name: Cyber Shield Screen Protector
description: 9H hardness tempered glass with oleophobic coating. Protect your device screen from scratches and fingerprints.
